ns0:entry.ns0:title: BenedictKing/ccx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BenedictKing/ccx
Language: go
Claude / Codex / Gemini API Proxy - CCX

ns0:entry.ns0:title: GoogleCloudPlatform/microservices-demo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/microservices-demo
Language: go
Sample cloud-first application with 10 microservices showcasing Kubernetes, Istio, and gRPC.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MHSanaei/3x-ui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MHSanaei/3x-ui
Language: go
Xray panel supporting multi-protocol multi-user expire day & traffic & IP limit (Vmess, Vless, Trojan, ShadowSocks, Wireguard, Hysteria, Tunnel, Mixed, HTTP, Tun)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA/gpu-operator
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/gpu-operator
Language: go
NVIDIA GPU Operator creates, configures, and manages GPUs in Kubernetes

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QuantumNous/new-api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QuantumNous/new-api
Language: go
A unified AI model hub for aggregation & distribution. It supports cross-converting various LLMs into OpenAI-compatible, Claude-compatible, or Gemini-compatible formats. A centralized gateway for personal and enterprise model management. 🍥

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Wei-Shaw/sub2api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Wei-Shaw/sub2api
Language: go
Sub2API-CRS2 一站式开源中转服务，让 Claude、Openai 、Gemini、Antigravity订阅统一接入，支持拼车共享，更高效分摊成本，原生工具无缝使用。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apernet/hysteria
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apernet/hysteria
Language: go
Hysteria is a powerful, lightning fast and censorship resistant proxy.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bytebase/bytebase
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bytebase/bytebase
Language: go
World's most advanced database DevSecOps solution for Developer, Security, DBA and Platform Engineering teams. The GitHub/GitLab for database DevSecOps.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: chaos-mesh/chaos-mesh
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/chaos-mesh/chaos-mesh
Language: go
A Chaos Engineering Platform for Kubernetes.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: chenhg5/cc-connect
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/chenhg5/cc-connect
Language: go
Bridge local AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Codex) to messaging platforms (Feishu/Lark, DingTalk, Slack, Telegram, Discord, LINE, WeChat Work). Chat with your AI dev assistant from anywhere — no public IP required for most platforms.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: containerd/containerd
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/containerd/containerd
Language: go
An open and reliable container runtime

ns0:entry.ns0:title: envoyproxy/gateway
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/envoyproxy/gateway
Language: go
Manages Envoy Proxy as a Standalone or Kubernetes-based Application Gateway

ns0:entry.ns0:title: etcd-io/etcd
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/etcd-io/etcd
Language: go
Distributed reliable key-value store for the most critical data of a distributed system

ns0:entry.ns0:title: go-acme/lego
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/go-acme/lego
Language: go
Let's Encrypt/ACME client and library written in Go

ns0:entry.ns0:title: go-playground/validator
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/go-playground/validator
Language: go
💯Go Struct and Field validation, including Cross Field, Cross Struct, Map, Slice and Array diving

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kserve/kserve
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kserve/kserve
Language: go
Standardized Distributed Generative and Predictive AI Inference Platform for Scalable, Multi-Framework Deployment on Kubernetes

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kubernetes/minikube
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kubernetes/minikube
Language: go
Run Kubernetes locally

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kubescape/kubescape
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kubescape/kubescape
Language: go
Kubescape is an open-source Kubernetes security platform for your IDE, CI/CD pipelines, and clusters. It includes risk analysis, security, compliance, and misconfiguration scanning, saving Kubernetes users and administrators precious time, effort, and resources.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: open-telemetry/opentelemetry-collector
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-collector
Language: go
OpenTelemetry Collector

ns0:entry.ns0:title: stretchr/testify
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/stretchr/testify
Language: go
A toolkit with common assertions and mocks that plays nicely with the standard library
